Thoroughly wash the leafy greens: Parsley, Romaine Lettuce, Kale.
Finely chop the greens and the Bell Pepper sweet component.
Toss the greens and sweet treats together.
Scatter the mixture over the hay base to encourage natural foraging behaviors.
